seoTitle: Hazel Park vs Hazelwood North — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hazel Park and Hazelwood North. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hazel Park vs Hazelwood North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hazel Park and Hazelwood North.
heading: Hazel Park vs Hazelwood North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hazel Park, Victoria and Hazelwood North, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hazelwood North has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Hazel Park (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hazel Park or Hazelwood North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hazel Park has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Hazelwood North scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hazel Park scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Hazelwood North scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hazel Park or Hazelwood North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hazelwood North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
